user.title: Librus APIX Integration Setup
user.description: Enter your Librus Synergia login credentials

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Librus APIX
reauth_confirm.description: Your Librus password no longer works for {username}. Enter the new password to restore the integration.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Librus. Please check your credentials.

abort.account_mismatch: The new username does not match this config entry. To use a different account, add it as a new integration.

init.title: Human-like sync settings
init.description: Tune how the integration paces its synchronisations to look like a real user. Defaults are conservative and safe.

data.off_school_multiplier: Multiplier on weekends, holidays and breaks
data.humanize: Enable human-like sync (off = legacy fixed cadence)

auth_failed.message: Authentication permanently failed — please re-enter password.

invalid_entry.message: Config entry {entry_id} not found or not loaded.

entry_not_initialized.message: Config entry is not fully initialized.

message_not_found.message: Message with href '{href}' not found in current data.

librus_lib_outdated.title: Librus parser may be outdated
librus_lib_outdated.description: The Librus integration has been unable to fetch any data for {username} across multiple consecutive refreshes. This usually means Librus changed their HTML/CSS structure and the `librus-apix` library needs to be upgraded. Check the issue tracker for a newer release of the integration.

auth_failed.title: Re-authentication required
auth_failed.description: Authentication for {username} failed permanently. Home Assistant has started the re-authentication flow — open Settings → Devices & Services and enter the new Librus password to restore the integration.
